| Time  | Topic                                                              |
|-------|--------------------------------------------------------------------|
| 9:00  | [Welcome + Introduction](workshop/01-welcome.qmd)                  |
| 9:10  | [Introduction to Shiny](workshop/02-shiny_intro.qmd)               |
| 9:20  | [Your first application](workshop/03-first_app.qmd)                |
| 9:50  | [Shiny reactivity](workshop/04-reactivity.qmd)                     |
| 10:20 | [Deploying your application](workshop/05-deploy.qmd)               |
| 10:30 | ☕ Coffee + Tea Break                                               |
| 11:00 | [Your next application](workshop/06-next_app.qmd)                  |
| 11:30 | [An AI + LLM primer](workshop/07-ai_primer.qmd)                    |
| 11:50 | [AI + LLM dashboards](workshop/08-ai_dashboards.qmd)               |
| 12:10 | [Testing](workshop/09-testing.qmd) your shiny apps with playwright |
| 12:20 | [Wrap up](workshop/10-wrap_up.qmd) + Feedback Survey               |
| 12:30 | Finish                                                             |
